headline: Hormel Foods Corporation to Participate in Oppenheimer 26th Annual Consumer Growth & E-Commerce Conference
summary: Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL), a Fortune 500 global branded food company, announced today that John Ghingo, president, and Paul Kuehneman, interim chief financial officer and controller, will participate in a fireside chat at the virtual Oppenheimer 26th Annual Consumer Growth & E-Commerce Conference on Monday, June 8, 2026. A webcast of the fireside chat is scheduled to begin at 9:00 a.m. ET (8:00 a.m. CT).

headline: 1 Stock Under $50 Worth Your Attention and 2 We Ignore
summary: Stocks in the $10-50 range offer a sweet spot between affordability and stability as they’re typically more established than penny stocks. But their headline prices don’t guarantee quality, and investors should exercise caution as some have shaky business models.
